summary: Iteration 47 - Tested 2 new features: 1) exit_date editable in member form, 2) Dashboard alert zone for expiring subscriptions. All backend tests (7/7) passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

PUT /api/members/{id} with exit_date.details: Setting exit_date moves member to Partis. Clearing exit_date returns member to active.

GET /api/members/expiring?days=60.details: Returns members with subscriptions expiring within 60 days, with days_remaining field, sorted ascending

GET /api/members/expiring (default 30 da.details: Default parameter returns members expiring within 30 days

Expiring members excludes departed.details: Members with exit_date are excluded from expiring members list

GET /api/members/stats.details: Returns correct counts: active_members=66, active_coaches=29, departed=226

GET /api/members/memberships.details: Returns 26 unique membership types sorted alphabetically

exit_date_field_in_edit_modal.details: Edit modal shows 'DATE DE SORTIE' field (red label with UserX icon) with data-testid='exit-date-input'

dashboard_alert_zone.details: Alert zone shows 'ABONNEMENTS EXPIRANT BIENTÔT (1)' with Caroline Martinod (PACK 20 SESSIONS, 33j restants, Fin: 2026-04-18)

alert_zone_color_coding.details: 33 days remaining shows green background (>30 days). Color coding: red <=7 days, yellow <=30 days, green >30 days

members_page_stat_cards.details: Active=66, Coaches=29, Expired=5, Expiring(30j)=0, Partis=226, All=100

membership_filter.details: Filter dropdown shows 27 options (26 memberships + 'Tous les abonnements')

features_verified: 1. exit_date field visible in member edit modal with red styling and UserX icon
2. PUT /api/members/{id} correctly handles exit_date field - members move to 'Partis' tab when set
3. Clearing exit_date returns member to active state
4. Dashboard alert zone shows expiring members within 60 days (fetched from /api/members/expiring?days=60)
5. Alert zone displays: member name, membership type, days remaining, end date
6. Color coding works: green for >30 days (33j restants displayed in green)
7. GET /api/members/expiring returns sorted list with days_remaining field
8. Dashboard KPI cards: Membres actifs=66, Coachs actifs=29 (real-time stats)
9. Membership filter dropdown shows 26 unique membership types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features tested successfully: (1) exit_date field in member edit modal - styled in red, has clear button, moves members to Partis tab when set. (2) Dashboard alert zone for expiring subscriptions - shows members from /api/members/expiring?days=60, displays name/membership/days_remaining/end_date with color-coded badges (green >30d, yellow <=30d, red <=7d). Current expiring member: Caroline Martinod (PACK 20 SESSIONS, 33j restants). KPIs: 66 active members, 29 active coaches, 226 departed.

alert_zone.example: Caroline Martinod, PACK 20 SESSIONS, 33 days remaining, expires 2026-04-18
